use_cases: Display normalized incident metrics with trend indicators for system reliability monitoring
Visualize stacked area chart data for incident distribution across categories
Present key performance metrics with animated reveals in incident post-mortem reports
Track incident trends and patterns in DevOps/SRE dashboards
Monitor system health indicators with color-coded status visualization
ai_summary: A detailed incident report visualization component featuring a stacked normalized area chart with gradient fills, animated metric cards with trend indicators, and custom SVG alert icons. Built with reaviz for charting and framer-motion for scroll-based animations. Designed for DevOps and SaaS platforms to monitor system incidents, track reliability metrics, and present post-mortem data in an interactive dashboard format.
